# PERF-050 positive: regexp.MatchString inside a per-row loop
lang: go
file: PERF-050-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import "regexp"

func FindHits(rows []string) []bool {
	hits := make([]bool, 0, len(rows))
	for _, r := range rows {
		matched, _ := regexp.MatchString(`^[A-Z]+$`, r)
		hits = append(hits, matched)
	}
	return hits
}
